documentation.value:
```yaml
version: '3.8'
```
Specify the Compose file format version. Deprecated in recent Compose specs — the latest format is inferred automatically.

```yaml
services:
  web:
    image: nginx
```
Top-level element that defines the containers (services) to run.

```yaml
networks:
  frontend:
    driver: bridge
```
Top-level element that defines custom networks for services to connect to.

```yaml
volumes:
  db_data:
    driver: local
```
Top-level element that defines named volumes for persistent data storage.

```yaml
secrets:
  db_password:
    file: ./db_password.txt
```
Top-level element that defines secrets to be used by services.

```yaml
configs:
  my_config:
    file: ./config.txt
```
Top-level element that defines configuration objects to be used by services.

```yaml
name: my-project
```
Top-level element that sets the project name. Overrides the default directory-based naming.

```yaml
services:
  web:
    image: nginx:latest
```
Specify the Docker image to use for the service container.

```yaml
services:
  web:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
```
Build configuration for creating a Docker image from a Dockerfile.

```yaml
container_name: my-web-container
```
Specify a custom name for the container instead of the generated default.

```yaml
command: ["npm", "start"]
# or
command: npm start
```
Override the default command specified in the image's Dockerfile.

```yaml
entrypoint: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
# or
entrypoint: /entrypoint.sh
```
Override the default entrypoint specified in the image's Dockerfile.

```yaml
ports:
  - "8080:80"
  - "443:443"
```
Map host ports to container ports. Format: `HOST:CONTAINER` or `CONTAINER`.

```yaml
expose:
  - "3000"
  - "8000"
```
Expose ports to linked services without publishing them to the host.

```yaml
environment:
  NODE_ENV: production
  DB_HOST: db
# or list form
environment:
  - NODE_ENV=production
  - DB_HOST=db
```
Set environment variables in the container.

```yaml
env_file:
  - .env
  - ./config/.env.production
```
Load environment variables from a file.

```yaml
depends_on:
  db:
    condition: service_healthy
  redis:
    condition: service_started
```
Define startup and shutdown dependency order between services.

```yaml
restart: unless-stopped
# Options: no, always, on-failure, unless-stopped
```
Define the restart policy for the container.

completions.label: healthcheck

documentation.value:
```yaml
healthcheck:
  test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost"]
  interval: 30s
  timeout: 10s
  retries: 3
  start_period: 10s
```
Configure a health check for the service container.

```yaml
logging:
  driver: json-file
  options:
    max-size: "10m"
    max-file: "3"
```
Configure the logging driver and options for a service.

completions.label: deploy

documentation.value:
```yaml
deploy:
  replicas: 3
  resources:
    limits:
      cpus: '0.5'
      memory: 512M
  restart_policy:
    condition: on-failure
```
Specify deployment and runtime configuration (Swarm mode or resource limits).

```yaml
labels:
  com.example.description: "My web service"
  com.example.department: "Finance"
```
Add metadata labels to the container.

```yaml
working_dir: /app
```
Set the working directory inside the container.

```yaml
user: "1000:1000"
```
Override the user used to run the container process.

```yaml
stdin_open: true
```
Keep STDIN open even if not attached. Equivalent to `docker run -i`.

```yaml
tty: true
```
Allocate a pseudo-TTY. Equivalent to `docker run -t`.

```yaml
hostname: my-web-host
```
Set the container hostname.

```yaml
domainname: example.com
```
Set the container domain name.

```yaml
extra_hosts:
  - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
  - "myhost:192.168.1.10"
```
Add hostname mappings to `/etc/hosts` inside the container.

```yaml
dns:
  - 8.8.8.8
  - 8.8.4.4
```
Custom DNS server addresses.

```yaml
dns_search:
  - example.com
```
Custom DNS search domains.

```yaml
cap_add:
  - SYS_PTRACE
  - NET_ADMIN
```
Add Linux capabilities to the container.

```yaml
cap_drop:
  - ALL
```
Drop Linux capabilities from the container.

```yaml
privileged: true
```
Give extended privileges to the container. Use with caution.

```yaml
read_only: true
```
Mount the container root filesystem as read-only.

```yaml
security_opt:
  - no-new-privileges:true
  - seccomp:unconfined
```
Override default labeling and security options.

```yaml
sysctls:
  net.core.somaxconn: 1024
  net.ipv4.tcp_syncookies: 0
```
Set kernel parameters inside the container.

```yaml
ulimits:
  nofile:
    soft: 65535
    hard: 65535
  nproc: 65535
```
Override default ulimits for the container.

```yaml
tmpfs:
  - /tmp
  - /run
```
Mount a temporary filesystem inside the container.

```yaml
shm_size: '2gb'
```
Set the size of the shared memory (`/dev/shm`) allocation for the container.

```yaml
stop_signal: SIGTERM
```
The signal to send when stopping the container. Default is SIGTERM.

```yaml
stop_grace_period: 30s
```
Time to wait before forcefully killing a container. Default is 10s.

```yaml
init: true
```
Run an init process (tini) inside the container for proper signal handling and zombie process reaping.

```yaml
platform: linux/amd64
```
Target platform for the service container.

```yaml
profiles:
  - debug
  - development
```
Assign the service to one or more profiles. Service only starts when a matching profile is active.

```yaml
pull_policy: always
# Options: always, never, missing, build
```
Define when Compose should pull the image.

```yaml
network_mode: host
# Options: bridge, host, none, service:[service name]
```
Set the network mode for the service container.

```yaml
pid: host
```
Share the host PID namespace with the container.

```yaml
ipc: host
```
Set the IPC mode for the container.

```yaml
extends:
  file: common.yml
  service: webapp
```
Extend another service, optionally from another Compose file.

```yaml
scale: 3
```
Default number of containers to run for this service.

```yaml
devices:
  - "/dev/sda:/dev/xvdc:rwm"
```
Map host devices into the container.

```yaml
isolation: default
# Options: default, process, hyperv (Windows)
```
Container isolation technology.

```yaml
runtime: nvidia
```
Specify the runtime for the container (e.g., nvidia for GPU support).

```yaml
credential_spec:
  config: my_credential_spec
```
Configure the credential spec for managed service accounts (Windows).

```yaml
develop:
  watch:
    - action: sync
      path: ./src
      target: /app/src
    - action: rebuild
      path: package.json
```
Configure file watching for live development with `docker compose watch`.

```yaml
annotations:
  com.example.foo: bar
```
Add OCI annotations to the container.

```yaml
attach: false
```
When set to false, Compose does not collect service logs.

```yaml
networks:
  mynet:
    driver: bridge
volumes:
  mydata:
    driver: local
```
Specify the driver for networks or volumes.

```yaml
driver_opts:
  type: nfs
  o: addr=10.0.0.1,rw
  device: ":/exported/path"
```
Options for the network or volume driver.

```yaml
networks:
  mynet:
    external: true
volumes:
  mydata:
    external: true
```
Specify that a network or volume is created outside of Compose.

```yaml
networks:
  mynet:
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
```
Customize IP address management for a network.

```yaml
networks:
  backend:
    internal: true
```
Restrict external access to the network.

```yaml
networks:
  mynet:
    attachable: true
```
Allow standalone containers to attach to the network.

```yaml
networks:
  mynet:
    enable_ipv6: true
```
Enable IPv6 networking on the network.

```yaml
depends_on:
  db:
    condition: service_started
```
Wait until the dependency service has started.

```yaml
depends_on:
  db:
    condition: service_healthy
```
Wait until the dependency service's health check passes.

```yaml
depends_on:
  migrate:
    condition: service_completed_successfully
```
Wait until the dependency service has completed with exit code 0.

```yaml
web:
  image: nginx:alpine
  ports:
    - "80:80"
  volumes:
    - ./html:/usr/share/nginx/html
  restart: unless-stopped
```
A complete web service configuration snippet.

completions.label: Database service (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
db:
  image: postgres:16
  environment:
    POSTGRES_DB: mydb
    POSTGRES_USER: user
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
  volumes:
    - db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  ports:
    - "5432:5432"
```
A complete PostgreSQL database service snippet.

completions.label: Redis service (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
redis:
  image: redis:7-alpine
  ports:
    - "6379:6379"
  volumes:
    - redis_data:/data
  restart: unless-stopped
```
A complete Redis cache service snippet.

completions.insertText:
${1:redis}:
  image: redis:${2:7-alpine}
  ports:
    - "${3:6379}:${4:6379}"
  volumes:
    - ${5:redis_data}:/data
  restart: unless-stopped

completions.label: MySQL service (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
mysql:
  image: mysql:8
  environment:
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
    MYSQL_DATABASE: mydb
    MYSQL_USER: user
    MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
  volumes:
    - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
  ports:
    - "3306:3306"
```
A complete MySQL database service snippet.

completions.label: MongoDB service (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
mongo:
  image: mongo:7
  environment:
    MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: admin
    MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: password
  volumes:
    - mongo_data:/data/db
  ports:
    - "27017:27017"
```
A complete MongoDB service snippet.

completions.label: Nginx reverse proxy (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
nginx:
  image: nginx:alpine
  ports:
    - "80:80"
    - "443:443"
  volumes:
    - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
    - ./certs:/etc/nginx/certs:ro
  depends_on:
    - app
```
Reverse proxy with Nginx.

completions.insertText:
${1:nginx}:
  image: nginx:alpine
  ports:
    - "80:80"
    - "443:443"
  volumes:
    - ${2:./nginx.conf}:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
  depends_on:
    - ${3:app}
  restart: unless-stopped

completions.label: Docker Compose boilerplate (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=development
    volumes:
      - .:/app
    depends_on:
      - db
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
    volumes:
      - db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
volumes:
  db_data:
```
Complete docker-compose.yml boilerplate with app and database.

completions.label: Traefik service (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
traefik:
  image: traefik:v3.0
  command:
    - "--providers.docker=true"
    - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80"
  ports:
    - "80:80"
  volumes:
    - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
```
Traefik reverse proxy with Docker provider.

completions.insertText:
${1:traefik}:
  image: traefik:${2:v3.0}
  command:
    - "--providers.docker=true"
    - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80"
  ports:
    - "80:80"
  volumes:
    - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
  restart: unless-stopped

completions.label: Healthcheck (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
healthcheck:
  test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
  interval: 30s
  timeout: 10s
  retries: 3
  start_period: 40s
```
Full health check configuration.

completions.label: Volume mount (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
volumes:
  data:
    driver: local
    driver_opts:
      type: none
      o: bind
      device: /path/on/host
```
A named volume with local bind mount driver options.

completions.insertText:
${1:data}:
  driver: local
  driver_opts:
    type: none
    o: bind
    device: ${2:/path/on/host}

documentation.value:
```yaml
networks:
  backend:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
```
Custom bridge network with specific subnet.

```yaml
logging:
  driver: json-file
  options:
    max-size: "10m"
    max-file: "3"
```
JSON file logging with rotation.

completions.label: Deploy with resources (snippet)

documentation.value:
```yaml
deploy:
  resources:
    limits:
      cpus: '0.5'
      memory: 512M
    reservations:
      cpus: '0.25'
      memory: 256M
```
Resource limits and reservations for the service.

completions.insertText:
deploy:
  resources:
    limits:
      cpus: '${1:0.5}'
      memory: ${2:512M}
    reservations:
      cpus: '${3:0.25}'
      memory: ${4:256M}

completions.label: Build with args (snippet)
completions.detail: Build with context, dockerfile and args

documentation.value:
```yaml
build:
  context: .
  dockerfile: Dockerfile
  args:
    NODE_VERSION: 20
    ENV: production
  target: production
```
Build configuration with arguments and multi-stage target.

```yaml
develop:
  watch:
    - action: sync
      path: ./src
      target: /app/src
    - action: rebuild
      path: package.json
    - action: sync+restart
      path: ./config
      target: /app/config
```
File watching for `docker compose watch`.

```yaml
secrets:
  db_password:
    file: ./secrets/db_password.txt
services:
  db:
    secrets:
      - db_password
```
Define and use a file-based secret.

```yaml
include:
  - path: ./db/compose.yaml
  - path: ./monitoring/compose.yaml
```
Include other Compose files to combine multiple configurations.

```yaml
x-common: &common
  restart: unless-stopped
  logging:
    driver: json-file

services:
  web:
    <<: *common
    image: nginx
```
YAML extension fields (prefixed with `x-`) for reuse via anchors and aliases.

```yaml
x-logging: &logging
  logging:
    driver: json-file
    options:
      max-size: 10m

services:
  web:
    <<: *logging
```
Define reusable YAML blocks with anchors (`&name`) and merge with aliases (`<<: *name`).
